calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey for and with Ann Kelley.
Roberta Van Etten (Daughter of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Espey stated that she will submit a substitution of attorney and that a declaration of due diligence was filed on December 13th. Ms. Van Etta stated that she has not had contact with her Father for some years, that she has some questions and curiosity, that she did not know he had passed away or had property, that the house came from the Grandmother and questioned the line of the property. Ms. Espey requested an order granting the petition stating that notice was properly served based on the will. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-29-2017 Continued To Jan-08-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ann Kelley in Propria Persona.
Jane Froyd (Friend) also present.

Ms. Kelley stated that she believes the Son has a different name because the Mother to her Husband's Children remarried and that the Children took the name of the new Husband. Ms. Kelley also stated that the Daughter also married, that the original documents she mailed out were returned, that the addresses she used are the only ones she knows, that she called the phone numbers that were in the address book and that her Son attempted some google searches, but he never found anything. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to January 8, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Kelley will get a declaration from her Son.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Continued To Nov-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ann Kelley in Propria Persona.
Jane Froyd also present.

The Court informed Ms. Kelley that the petition is incomplete and that notes were sent to her by the Examiner. Ms. Kelley stated that she did not receive the notes. The Court advised Ms. Kelley that the proof of service was not dated, that item 5a(2) must be completed, that the proposed order is blank and needs to be completed, that she needs to explain why the names of the children in the will are different from the names listed on the petition and that item 9 must indicate the age of persons listed in the will. Ms. Froyd stated that she is helping Ms. Kelley and that the above matters will be corrected. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to November 29, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Probate Examiner will resend the notes to Ms. Kelley.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
